# nat-skeleton



<!-- Auto Generated Below -->


## Overview

Premium skeleton loading placeholder

## Properties

| Property   | Attribute  | Description                           | Type                           | Default     |
| ---------- | ---------- | ------------------------------------- | ------------------------------ | ----------- |
| `animated` | `animated` | Enable shimmer wave animation         | `boolean`                      | `true`      |
| `height`   | `height`   | Custom height (e.g., '100%', '200px') | `string`                       | `undefined` |
| `variant`  | `variant`  | The variant of the skeleton           | `"circle" \| "rect" \| "text"` | `'text'`    |
| `width`    | `width`    | Custom width (e.g., '100%', '200px')  | `string`                       | `undefined` |
